interpretation.data_bug: Genuine inconsistency in the synthetic generator — fix in Stage 5.
interpretation.tabulation_gap: SDTM derivation not implemented in the CDASH->SDTM pass (EPOCH, --DY study days, variable ordering, expected/required vars).
interpretation.harness: Artifact of validating raw CSV without a Define-XML / unsupplied reference variables; not a data-quality issue.

findings.message: MHCAT is grouping all records into one generic group. If no smaller categorization can be applied, then it is not necessary to include or populate this variable.
Parent record exists and DSDECOD is not null, but FAOBJ is not equal to DSDECOD.
